reviews.review_description:
Bewegung der Hand hat keinerlei Einfluss auf die Flugkurve des Pfeils
Ich möchte mein Geld zurück

reviews.review_title: JESUS CHRIST, can I just PLAY darts?
reviews.review_description:
I don't want to pop balloons, I don't want to explore the bar, and I don't want that f***ing blue sign constantly blocking the board telling me useless s**t, I just wanted to throw darts. Btw, your hand tracking SUCKS. Between THIS and that trainwreck you call pool I'm baffled by the thought of who could possibly be funding you. Do you hate fun or something? Are these games designed by special needs children? That isn't a joke, I'm genuinely asking. If you want to hate darts, buy this. 
NEVER again, if I see ForeVR, I'm running away screaming.

There is almost no control over dart. Rotation and throwing force doesn't matter. One can't disable "guiding line". So basically all "aiming" is watching a line matching place where we want to throw a dart. This way you could easily just play with a mouse on PC. It could be ok for children but I had higher expectations.

developer_response.body:
Hello CydPL, We're bummed to hear that you have had this experience. Our goal is to create an awesome virtual darts experience and we are curious to know more about yours. Different dart weights will affect your throw and needed throw force will change with the different darts you use.
Do you have this experience playing with hand tracking as well as controllers? Let us know here (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new) - Team ForeVR

reviews.review_title: jittery avatar and youtube volume bug
reviews.review_description:
I bought ForeVR Bowl and Darts and I had the same issues in both games. I share my games with my husband in the same WLAN. We are only a few metres away from each other and we could only see each other ingame with constant jittery, no fluent movement at all. XY reported that also on the 19.01.2024 in the meta store.

The biggest problem, however, is that you can only hear something on the YouTube player if you turn up the volume on max. But then you can no longer have a proper conversation and understand each other. I've already seen that in the reviews XY already reported this issue in the review from 20 June 01:07.

Have you some help to solve these problems? As I can see from the meta store reviews I quote I am not the only on that have these! If there is no improvement I will refund the games. 

I already opened a case on your bug question system.

developer_response.body:
Hello Serenara, We are sorry to hear that you are experiencing avatar and volume issues. We are eager to know how you link up with your husband for a game, your current volume settings, and if you see the jittering only with your husband. If you haven't included that information in your ticket please do so and we would greatly appreciate it. 
If you need to submit a new ticket please do so here (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)
Thank you. - Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Lots of fun, maybe some games?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review rimiller! See you in the halls! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description:
I've played darts on a league for many years, so I was skeptical about this.  Turns out it's really fun.  The different darts and boards are a good variety.   
This would be 5 stars if it was more than 01.  Unfortunately it does get boring after a while. Even if cricket and any other games are going  to come out, it would be nice for a novelty to be thrown in.  Moving dart board, balloon pop game, something besides 01.

developer_response.body: Hi FN_Nightmare_! You are on a darts league?! That's super cool! Thank you for giving our game a chance! We totally hear you on more game modes, and cricket is coming very soon! We also just released count up a couple of weeks ago! With each update we planning on brining in more fun! Thanks for your review FN_Nightmare_!🎯 Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Great game, fun to play with friends and family.

developer_response.body: Hey Keri231! Thanks for your review! Love to hear you are having fun playing with your friends and family! Happy holidays! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: This game bring the pub atmosphere to VR! The dart mechanics, the game modes and graphics really come together in a great package. The jukebox function is a stroke of genius. Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review Mr.Magoo21! Get ready more darts, game modes, and more fun is on the way!🎯 Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Love the you tube jukebox. However,  the tracking seems to need a little more adjusting.  I see the sleeves of my shirt in the view when aiming at the board sometimes.  The game is relaxing and the throws are accurate.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and review Jcram4644! While hand tracking was an experimental feature from Oculus we strive to make it an awesome experience! 
If you have any other feedback you'd like to share please send it to our support team at (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new) Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: The hand tracking is awful but the game is pretty darn good once you get the hang of throwing

developer_response.body:
Hey rfmiller81! Thank you so much for your review and feedback! While hand tracking is an experimental feature from Oculus we are dedicated to making an AWESOME darts experience! 
We have an article on "Tips and Tricks for Hand Tracking" that might help improve your hand tracking experience and that article is located here (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/4416133825165-Hand-Tracking-Tips-Tricks-)
Game on rfmiller81! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: The tracking and the way the little guide thing lines up the shot does not feel the way it should if you were actually throwing a dart. Totally does not feel correct or like real darts at all. Wish i hadn't wasted the money!

developer_response.body:
Hi Shannonw374, We would love to learn more about your experience and turn it to a positive one! Please reach out to our support team at (link: forevrgames.com/support) so we can chat further. 
We do have an FAQ page about hand tracking that offers tips and tricks (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/4416133825165-Hand-Tracking-Tips-Tricks-). 
Even though hand tracking is an experimental feature from Oculus, we are fully dedicated to creating the best virtual darts experience possible! Hearing more feedback from you would be really insightful and we look forward to hearing from you. - Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: I am still learning but love the dynamics of the game.  It feels like you are playing darts and the mechanics match the real thing.  A great addition if you already have foreVR bowl.

developer_response.body: Magnoliamusical thanks for your feedback and review! One of our goals was to create as close to as an authentic darts experience as we could! Love to hear you are enjoying it! Happy holidays! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Hand tracking was cool but seems glitchy yet.  Enjoyable game!

developer_response.body:
Welcome MNCountry! While hand tracking is an experimental feature from Oculus we are dedicated to making an AWESOME darts experience! If you run into anything you are unsure of you can always reach out to our support team (link: forevrgames.com/support) and we would be more than happy to help! 
We want you to have a great time MNCountry! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: The game is great! Love the graphics and rooms,  just like all the FOREVR games.  Only issue I had was with the aiming, it was a little hard to get the hang of, I'm still working on it honestly,  but in all its a great game!

developer_response.body: Hey Alid0213, thank you for sharing your experience with us! We'd recommend checking out easy mode and lighter darts to easy into a more challenging throw. We are 100% here for you and if you have any questions please let us know here (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us) Happy Holidays! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. It's as close as to having a real dartboard accuracy is on point.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words reno1430! We love that you love ForeVR Darts!🎯 Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: I want to like this game I really do. The potential is there. The setting looks good. YouTube playlist on in the background is brilliant. The pick up and play is there, but the hand tracking and the tracking of your throws is not great. I am only playing on easy but when I'm picking up a dart, and moving it around the board, it doesn't track very well. My hand position to target position are way off. The delay in moving around the board as well is poor.  I am sure with updates this will be sorted and then I will rate higher. For right now I think 3 stars is as high as I can rate.

developer_response.body:
Hello LiamG1878, thank you for your review and feedback. We'd love be to help troubleshoot any hand tracking questions you have. Can you reach out to our support team here (link: forevrgames.com/support) so we can chat further? Thanks! 
Even though hand tracking is an experiential feature from Oculus our goal is to create the best virtual darts experience possible! We also have an FAQ page that's has tips and tricks for using hand tracking! (link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/4416133825165-Hand-Tracking-Tips-Tricks-)
-Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description:
Amazing! This game is such a easy pick up game to play solo or with friends. My friend and I were having a blast throwing darts at each other instead of the board! Lol. Can’t wait for what the devs have planned next! 

I do have question for the devs, is there any way when you play a song from the jukebox, the other person can hear it? I was in a party chat (not game chat) and only I could hear it? If this works in game chat, please ignore :) 

Thank you again for such a fun game!

developer_response.body: Hi Mattyice1990! Love that you and your friend are having fun! Having fun with friends is definitely one of our goals! Currently, only you can hear you what you are playing on the jukebox, but we totally want to explore adding this feature to the game in the future! Thanks for your review!🎯 Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description:
I was so impressed with ForeVR pool I decided to get the darts game as well. You need a steady hand for this one but once you get use to it it's so much fun. Only problem is with the online lobbies I haven't seen anyone else on there yet.
But I'm sure in time this will pick up and create some great competitions.
Congratulations ForeVR you smashed it again I'm looking forward to seeing what other games they come up with.

developer_response.body: Hey there ScottVR666! Thank you for your darts review too! We're thrilled to hear that you are enjoying darts too! Players often use our discord to connect with one another and we'd love for you to join! (link: https://discord.gg/forevrgames) Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: I must give VR darts its well-deserved appreciation for this product. I found the graphics and usability very friendly and life-like. I look forward to playing in it for a long time.

developer_response.body: MrH56! Thank you so much for your review and kind words! Please look forward to updates with more game modes, halls, darts, and other fun content in the future! Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Very fun! Realistic to a point. Easy to use!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review Trixie52275!🎯 Team ForeVR
